name: python3-zipp
title: python3-zipp
description:
pathlib-compatible Zipfile object wrapper - Python 3.x
A backport of the Path object to older versions of Python.
It's pathlib-compatible interface for zip files using zipfile object inside.
.
This package contains Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zipp because pathlib-compatible Zipfile object wrapper - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zipp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zipp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zipp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
